## Why It Works

This Tweet works really well for a few reasons. First, most people are familiar with Naval Ravikant's old viral Tweet called "How to get rich (without being lucky)." I play off that in the opening line a bit. That gets people hooked in. Then, rather than a laundry list of complex, deep advice, I simply tell them the real answer. Do more of the stuff worth doing. It's both a simple message, but a needed message. Posts like this almost always resonate.

## Template

How to increase your [THING]:
- [BASIC SKILL1] more
- [BASIC SKILL2] more
- [BASIC SKILL3] more
- [SLIGHT TWIST BASIC SKILL4] more
- [SLIGHT TWIST BASIC SKILL5] more
[THING] often comes from putting in more reps.

## Example

Here's an example using the template, written from the perspective of a coach:

How to increase your influence as an executive:
- Listen more
- Ask more
- Share more
- Empower others more
- Celebrate wins more
Turns out, influence often comes from putting in more reps.
